top_signals.title: US couldn’t repair battle-damaged ships in war with China, study finds
top_signals.summary: Battle-damaged U.S. warships could not be quickly repaired and returned to combat during a war with China, according to a new study by RAND.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: 【今朝の5本】仕事を始める前に読んでおきたい厳選ニュース
top_signals.summary: AIブーム過熱を警戒、「米国が管理」、ゴールドマン業績好調、スペースX大型起債へ、一極集中に警鐘
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: AI Boom Sees Investors Shift From Japan’s Value to Growth Stocks
top_signals.summary: Japanese equities, long regarded by global investors as a value market, are beginning to attract growth funds, as AI-linked firms power to the top of market-cap rankings, beating out the manufacturers and telecoms giants that dominated for decades.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Cerebras falls 8% after chipmaker forecasts shrinking margin in first earnings report since IPO
top_signals.summary: Cerebras went public on the Nasdaq in May, giving Wall Street access to a pureplay AI company.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: HDI Global Reorganizes US Operations, Welcomes New CEO
top_signals.summary: As part of its new group strategy Xcelerate29, HDI Global (HDI) announced a new organizational setup and leadership changes in its US business.In line with the Xcelerate29 strategy, HDI Global is pursuing growth in the US market. To meet the requirements of the coming years…
